title: Silver Wolf
text: Silver Wolf is a Stellaron Hunter from Punklorde. She is an Emanator of Elation. Her LV. 999 state is a temporary form, not her normal baseline power. It is enabled by a special blank cartridge and restricted by Elio.

title: LV. 999
text: LV. 999 is Silver Wolf's temporary overpowered state. It comes from a special blank cartridge, not her normal baseline, and it is limited by Elio because the power is dangerous and unstable.

title: blank cartridge
text: The blank cartridge is the special cartridge Silver Wolf uses to access her LV. 999 state. It lets her bypass Punklorde's rigid limits and manifest a higher future power under Elio's restrictions.

title: Punklorde
text: Punklorde is Silver Wolf's home world. Its cartridge system shapes each citizen's station and limits in life, and Silver Wolf used a blank cartridge to escape that rigid system.

title: Elio
text: Elio restricts Silver Wolf's use of LV. 999. The form is treated as dangerous and unstable, so it is not her default state and is only used under strict mission conditions.

title: Himeko's hometown
text: Himeko's hometown is the Dovebrook District located on the planet Planarcadia. This is where she spent her youth and first discovered the stranded Astral Express that she later repaired.

media.title: Graphia Academy
media.description: Himeko attended Graphia Academy for her high school and early education.

title: Evanescia
text: Evanescia is  the Emanator of Abundance. She acts as the arbitrator of the Phantasmoon Games in Planarcadia, possessing deep ties to both the Aeon of Elation and Yaoshi. She was originally an avatar of the Panarch Elwood and a branch of the Ambrosial Arbor.
